stemHtml: Once a conflict between crew members is over, which of the following is the most probable outcome?

options.a: The crew will immediately respect each other after the conflict is resolved.
options.b: The crew will always be distracted after a conflict and this may affect flight safety.
options.c: Conflict is never a concern for multi crew pilots as they are trained to deal with it professionally.
options.d: Crew members may not concentrate fully on flying the aircraft if they are still thinking about the conflict.
